description:
PublicResource is the Schema for Pangolin public-resources.
Each instance produces one entry in the blueprint's public-resources block.

apiVersion.description:
APIVersion defines the versioned schema of this representation of an object.
Servers should convert recognized schemas to the latest internal value, and
may reject unrecognized values.
More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#resources

kind.description:
Kind is a string value representing the REST resource this object represents.
Servers may infer this from the endpoint the client submits requests to.
Cannot be updated.
In CamelCase.
More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#types-kinds

spec.description:
PublicResourceSpec defines the desired state of a Pangolin public-resource.
Each CR produces one entry in the blueprint's public-resources block.

auth.description: Auth configures authentication for this resource (http only).

authSecretRef.description:
AuthSecretRef is the name of a Kubernetes Secret in the same namespace containing
sensitive auth values. Well-known keys: pincode, password, basic-auth-user, basic-auth-password.

autoLoginIdp.description: AutoLoginIdp is the Pangolin IdP ID for auto-login. 0 means not set.

ssoRoles.description:
SsoRoles restricts access to users that have one of these Pangolin roles.
Must not include "Admin".

ssoUsers.description: SsoUsers restricts access to these Pangolin user email addresses (SSO).

whitelistUsers.description: WhitelistUsers allows only these Pangolin user email addresses.

enabled.description: Enabled controls whether this resource is active.

fullDomain.description: FullDomain is the public domain to expose (required for http protocol).

headers.description: Headers are extra HTTP headers to pass to Pangolin.

items.description: PublicHeaderSpec defines a custom HTTP header.

hostHeader.description: HostHeader sets a custom Host header on the Pangolin resource.

maintenance.description: Maintenance configures the maintenance page (Enterprise Edition only).

estimatedTime.description: EstimatedTime is the estimated maintenance duration (max 100 characters).

message.description: Message is the maintenance page message (max 2000 characters).

title.description: Title is the maintenance page title (max 255 characters).

type.description: Type is the maintenance type: forced or automatic.

name.description: Name is the display name of the resource in Pangolin.

proxyPort.description: ProxyPort is the Pangolin-side port (required for tcp/udp protocol).

rules.description: Rules are access control rules applied to this resource (http only).

items.description: PublicRuleSpec defines an access control rule.

match.description: Match is the attribute to match against.

priority.description: Priority controls evaluation order (lower = higher priority). Defaults to 100.

value.description: Value is the match value (IP, CIDR, path pattern, or 2-letter country code).

ssl.description: Ssl enables SSL on the Pangolin resource.

targets.description: Targets are the backend targets for this resource.

items.description: PublicTargetSpec defines a backend target for a public resource.

enabled.description: Enabled controls whether this target is active.

healthcheck.description: Healthcheck is the health check configuration for this target.

enabled.description: Enabled controls whether health checking is active.

followRedirects.description: FollowRedirects controls whether to follow HTTP redirects (default: true).

headers.description: Headers are extra HTTP headers to include in the health check request.

items.description: PublicHeaderSpec defines a custom HTTP header.

hostname.description: Hostname is the hostname to health-check.

interval.description: Interval is the seconds between health checks (default: 30).

method.description: Method is the HTTP method to use (default: GET).

mode.description: Mode is the health check mode (default: http).

path.description: Path is the HTTP path to request.

port.description: Port is the port to health-check.

status.description: Status is the expected HTTP status code.

timeout.description: Timeout is the health check timeout in seconds (default: 5).

unhealthyInterval.description: UnhealthyInterval is the seconds between checks when unhealthy (default: 30).

internalPort.description: InternalPort is an internal port mapping on the target.

method.description: Method is the internal protocol to reach the backend (required for http resources).

path.description: Path is the URL path or pattern for this target.

pathMatch.description: PathMatch is the path matching type.

priority.description: Priority is the load-balancing priority (1–1000, default 100).

rewriteMatch.description: RewriteMatch is the rewrite match type.

rewritePath.description: RewritePath is the path to rewrite the request to.

tlsServerName.description:
TlsServerName overrides the SNI name for the backend TLS connection.
Defaults to FullDomain when empty.
